title: Cuspidaria callistegioides
intro: Cuspidaria callistegioides, also known as Chinese bugbane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, it is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and supporting the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues. The bioactive constituents of Cuspidaria callistegioides include sesquiterpenoid lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Cuspidaria callistegioides is commonly prepared as a tea or used in traditional Chinese patent medicines to treat a range of health conditions.
